overall.description: A cinematic third-person view from a video game showing a hooded character in a white cloak standing on a windswept sandy beach. The scene features a historic stone tower with a golden spire, a wooden pier, dramatic coastal rock formations, and dynamic cloud formations overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal beach with medieval stone tower and wooden dock

events.description: flock of birds flies across the sky from left to right above the coastal rocks

agents.ego_description: hooded character stands on the beach facing the stone tower, white cloak billowing gently in the coastal wind, occasionally shifting weight

entered.detail: tall stone tower with golden spire and arched windows, situated on the beachhead
weathered wooden pier structure extending along the shoreline with vertical posts
large natural rock arch with grassy top, forming a cave-like opening
tall rocky sea stacks rising from the ocean water in the distance
calm ocean water with gentle waves lapping at the sandy shore

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a windswept sandy beach facing a historic stone tower with a golden spire. To the right, a wooden pier runs along the shore beneath a massive rock arch formation, while coastal sea stacks rise from the ocean on the left. A flock of birds flies overhead as the wind catches the character's white cloak.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a sweeping view of a windswept coastal landscape centered around a historic stone tower. It begins with a hooded character in a white cloak standing on a sandy beach, their garment fluttering in the breeze as they face the tower's golden spire. As the camera lingers, the perspective encompasses the surrounding environment, revealing a wooden pier stretching along the shore beneath a massive rock arch to the right. The scene then expands to include jagged sea stacks rising from the ocean on the left, while a flock of birds glides through the dynamic clouds overhead.
